335],[329,532,1776529559357],[328,532,1776529559374],[327,533,1776529559385],[327,534,1776529559392],[326,534,1776529559400],[325,535,1776529559410],[324,535,1776529559425],[324,536,1776529559435],[323,536,1776529559443],[322,536,1776529559450],[322,537,1776529559460],[321,537,1776529559471],[320,537,1776529559482],[319,538,1776529559491],[318,539,1776529559498],[317,539,1776529559522],[316,539,1776529559531],[315,540,1776529559541],[314,540,1776529559551],[312,541,1776529559573],[311,541,1776529559587],[310,541,1776529559597],[309,541,1776529559604],[308,542,1776529559618],[307,542,1776529559643],[306,542,1776529559652],[305,543,1776529559661],[304,543,1776529559667],[304,543,1776529559691],[305,544,1776529559698],[306,544,1776529559709],[307,545,1776529559741],[308,545,1776529559754],[309,546,1776529559767],[310,546,1776529559780]],"mm-mp":18.136774193548387,"md":[[366,475,1776529553270],[319,538,1776529559511]],"md-mp":3022.5,"mu":[[366,475,1776529553346],[319,538,1776529559678]],"mu-mp":3046.25},"v":1,"tc":{}}
